summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Homepage SEO overhaul. All 16 test cases passed. Homepage has proper meta tags, OG tags, JSON-LD schemas (Organization + FAQ), optimized header hierarchy with data-testid attributes, all 8 content sections, and complete internal link structure.

passed: 1. Homepage meta title: 'Merchant Services & POS Systems | Payment Processing Solutions'
2. Homepage H1 contains: 'Merchant Services & POS Systems for Restaurants, Retail, Healthcare & Service Businesses'
3. All 5 OG tags present: og:title, og:description, og:url, og:type, og:image
4. JSON-LD Organization schema with name='Merchant Solutions Corp' and foundingDate='2012'
5. JSON-LD FAQ schema present with 3 questions
6. All 7 section H2s present with correct data-testid: payment-solutions-h2, pos-systems-h2, industries-h2, automation-h2, florida-h2, free-pos-h2, faq-h2
10. POS section has 4 cards: Clover (/clover-pos-system), Square (/pos/square), Payanywhere (/payanywhere-pos), Ingenico (/payment-terminals)
11. Industries section has 3 cards: Restaurants, Retail, Healthcare
14. FAQ has 3 questions with working expand/collapse functionality

15. Internal links footer has all 10 required links: /pos-systems, /payment-terminals, /clover-pos-system, /payanywhere-pos, /restaurant-payment-processing-services, /cloud-kitchen-pos-system, /food-trucks-pos, /free-pos-system, /white-label-merchant-services, /payment-processing-pricing
16. robots.txt accessible at /robots.txt with correct Sitemap URL (merchantsolutionscorp.com/sitemap.xml) and admin disallows

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is well-structured with proper SEO implementation
All data-testid attributes correctly added for testing
JSON-LD schemas properly embedded using Helmet
mockData import removed - all content directly in component for better SEO
robots.txt includes Cloudflare managed content + custom disallow rules
